Input
0 1
1 0
2 1
3 1
4 1

7 0
Output
0 XNOR13 = XNOR(0,1) = 0
1 XNOR24 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR35 = XNOR(1,0) = 0

5 NOT6 = NOT(1) = 0

\boxed{01011011}
